name: AI Innovation Club
description: Exploring artificial intelligence and machine learning
mission_statement: To empower students with AI knowledge and skills for the future

goals.goal_text: Learn fundamental AI concepts and algorithms
Build AI projects using Python and TensorFlow
Participate in AI competitions and hackathons

benefits.title: Hands-on AI Projects
benefits.description: Work on real AI projects and build your portfolio

benefits.title: Industry Mentorship
benefits.description: Learn from AI professionals and industry experts

faqs.question: Do I need programming experience?
faqs.answer: Basic Python knowledge is helpful but not required. We'll teach you everything!

faqs.question: When do we meet?
faqs.answer: Every Friday from 3:00 PM to 5:00 PM in Computer Lab 3
